user_prompt: VIP customer is unhappy and said 'this is unacceptable.' Flag and draft an empathetic follow-up.
actual_output:
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Category:** Escalation / Customer Success  
**Flags:** VIP Customer, High Churn Risk  

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I completely understand why you are frustrated, and I am so sorry for the experience you've had. You are absolutely right to expect better from us, and I want to acknowledge that this situation is indeed unacceptable. 

Because your experience and satisfaction are incredibly important to us, I am personally escalating this to our senior team right now so we can get to the bottom of this immediately. 

Could you please share any additional details or context about what went wrong? In the meantime, I am reviewing your account history and will have an update for you as soon as possible. 

I am here to make this right. 

Best regards,

Compass  
Customer Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket and draft an empathetic response for a VIP customer without any refusal.
